name: Braised Beef Short Ribs with Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Beef Short Ribs, Cut Into 3-Inch Pieces
2 medium White Potatoes, Pared and Cut Into Cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge the meat in a mixture of flour, salt, and pepper.
2. Brown the dredged meat well on all sides in fat (or oil) in a deep skillet or Dutch oven.
3. Add water to cover the bottom of the pan, then add the potatoes, onions, and carrots.
4. Cover and simmer over low heat for 2 hours.
5. Stir occasionally until both the meat and vegetables are tender.
6. Remove the meat to a heated platter.
7. Thicken the gravy if necessary by blending 1 tbsp flour with 1 1/2 tbsp water for each cup of gravy.
8. Add more water, if needed, when the vegetables are added.
